subject: Chess Strategy & Tactics
achievement: Successfully guided student from basic rules to independent analysis of complex board positions.
reflection: Built a structured approach to opening and endgame theory. Demonstrated capability through a practical match to establish trust, fostering patience and analytical decision-making in the student.

subject: Scratch Game Development
achievement: Mentored student to build and deploy multiple functional game projects, including physics-based games and shooter mechanics.
reflection: Guided student from fundamental block-based programming to complex game architecture. Fostered strong independent problem-solving and logical debugging skills throughout the 50+ sessions.

teaching_logs.subject: Chess Mentorship
teaching_logs.onboarding_story: Before starting our mentorship, the family required a demonstration match with the father to assess my tactical approach. Securing a win not only built trust but also established the foundation for our 32-session learning journey.
teaching_logs.mentorship_reflection: Over the course of 32 sessions, I guided the student through structured chess concepts. The focus was on building a logical foundation, improving tactical vision, and cultivating patience. The student showed consistent growth in analyzing board positions and making calculated decisions.
